items.title: Accra floods disrupt business activities as traders, trucks are stranded on major roads
items.summary:
Businesses and economic activities are at a standstill in the national capital, Accra, as several traders and trucks heading to Accra from various parts of the country for trading activities are stuck, following flooding.

The floodwaters follow long hours of night rain, which has since entered homes, offices and blocked major roads in a greater part of Accra, disrupting movement.
